description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the code, setting up .NET Core 3.1.102 and Node.js 10.x. It should then publish documentation to a gh-pages branch using a GitHub Pages deploy action, package a nightly NuGet package, and publish it to NuGet using a provided API key.
